languages.text: "Что происходит? Номос не понимают. Архивы памяти пустеют, осознание истончается, все... исчезает... Номос... напуганы. Скажи нам, что происходит? В чем мы провинились?"

traits.locale_text: "Что происходит? Номос не понимают. Архивы памяти пустеют, осознание истончается, все... исчезает... Номос... напуганы. Скажи нам, что происходит? В чем мы провинились?"

languages.text: "What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"
languages.original_text: "Что происходит? Номос не понимают. Архивы памяти пустеют, осознание истончается, все... исчезает... Номос... напуганы. Скажи нам, что происходит? В чем мы провинились?"

traits.locale_text: "What is happening? Nomos not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"
"What is happening? Nomos not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

"What is happening? Nomos does not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

"What is happening? Nomos does not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

"What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

languages.text: "Was ist los? Nomos verstehen nicht. Unsere Speicherarchive leeren sich. Unser Bewusstsein schwindet. Alles ... verblasst. Nomos ... haben Angst. Sagt uns, was passiert. Was haben wir falsch gemacht?"
languages.original_text: "What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

traits.locale_text: "Was ist los? Nomos verstehen nicht. Unsere Speicherarchive leeren sich. Unser Bewusstsein schwindet. Alles ... verblasst. Nomos ... haben Angst. Sagt uns, was passiert. Was haben wir falsch gemacht?"

languages.text: “怎么回事？诺莫斯不明白。我们的记忆存档正在清空。我们的意识正在变淡。一切……都在消逝。诺莫斯……害怕。告诉我们发生了什么。我们做错了什么？”
languages.original_text: "What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

traits.locale_text: “怎么回事？诺莫斯不明白。我们的记忆存档正在清空。我们的意识正在变淡。一切……都在消逝。诺莫斯……害怕。告诉我们发生了什么。我们做错了什么？”

languages.text: « Que se passe-t-il ? Nous ne comprenons pas. Nos archives mémorielles se vident. Notre conscience disparaît. Tout... devient sombre. Nous... avons peur. Dites-nous ce qu'il nous arrive. Qu'avons-nous fait de mal ? »
languages.original_text: "What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

traits.locale_text: « Que se passe-t-il ? Nous ne comprenons pas. Nos archives mémorielles se vident. Notre conscience disparaît. Tout... devient sombre. Nous... avons peur. Dites-nous ce qu'il nous arrive. Qu'avons-nous fait de mal ? »

languages.text: «¿Qué ocurre? Nomos no entendemos. Nuestros bancos de memoria se están vaciando. Nuestra consciencia se dispersa. Todo... se desvanece. Nomos... tenemos miedo. Díganos qué ocurre. ¿Hemos hecho algo mal?».
languages.original_text: "What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué ocurre? Nomos no entendemos. Nuestros bancos de memoria se están vaciando. Nuestra consciencia se dispersa. Todo... se desvanece. Nomos... tenemos miedo. Díganos qué ocurre. ¿Hemos hecho algo mal?».

languages.text: "Neler oluyor? Nomos anlamıyor. Bellek arşivlerimiz boşalıyor. Farkındalığımız zayıflıyor. Her şey... Soluyor. Nomos... Korkuyor. Neler olduğunu bize anlatın. Neyi yanlış yaptık?"
languages.original_text: "What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

traits.locale_text: "Neler oluyor? Nomos anlamıyor. Bellek arşivlerimiz boşalıyor. Farkındalığımız zayıflıyor. Her şey... Soluyor. Nomos... Korkuyor. Neler olduğunu bize anlatın. Neyi yanlış yaptık?"

languages.text: 「何が起きているのか？ノモスは理解できない。記憶のアーカイブが空っぽになっている。意識が薄れている。全て…消えつつある。ノモス…恐れている。何が起きているのか教えてくれ。私たちは何を間違えたのか？」
languages.original_text: "What is happening? Nomos do not understand. Our memory archives are emptying. Our awareness is thinning. Everything... is fading. Nomos... are afraid. Tell us what is happening. What have we done wrong?"

traits.locale_text: 「何が起きているのか？ノモスは理解できない。記憶のアーカイブが空っぽになっている。意識が薄れている。全て…消えつつある。ノモス…恐れている。何が起きているのか教えてくれ。私たちは何を間違えたのか？」
